zh.lifeSummary: John Timberlake於大約1620年出生在美國羅得島紐波特蕾托 康普頓。他和Mary至少有1個女兒。

nameMeanings.name: Timberlake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost place in the parish ofBayton, Worcestershire, so named from Old English timber‘timber, wood’ + lacu ‘stream’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.description: The Colony of Rhode Island and Providence Plantations, as it was from June 22, 1703, when it created the counties of Providence Plantations and Rhode Island, to June 16, 1729, when Providence Plantations County was renamed Providence, Rhode Island County was renamed Newport, and Kings County was created from Providence.

en.lifeSummary: John Timberlake was born about 1620, in Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, United States. He had at least 1 daughter with Mary.

ko.lifeSummary: John Timberlake(은)는 대략 1620년 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴에서 태어났다. 그는 Mary(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.
